$comment: Curated static example authored from the inventory. It is not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.primaryNavigation: Client-side navigation switches the workspace between Invoices, Customers, and Collections.
transitions.collectionControls: Search, status selection, and table or grid controls update the visible invoice collection; empty results offer Clear filters.
transitions.invoiceInspection: Selecting a row, card, customer, or collection item opens its detail Dialog.
transitions.paymentRecording: Mark as paid is a client-only transition: it updates the selected invoice status and every fixture-derived summary, customer balance, and collection value.
